title: HausLockFile
description: Written by `haus install` / `haus apply`. Read by `haus update`. Tracks installed catalog items per project.

type.description: Item type. Must match catalog-item.schema.json type enum.

source.description: "haus" for first-party items. "curated" for approved external items.

version.description: haus CLI package version when this row was written.

catalogRef.$comment: Downstream-owned by haus-workflow runtime; kept here as contract mirror for cross-repo drift checks.
catalogRef.description: Git ref (tag or branch) the catalog was fetched from at install time. Matches HAUS_CATALOG_REF env var. Defaults to 'main'.

hash.description: sha256 digest of installed files listed in paths. Placeholder when paths is empty.

paths.description: Relative paths (from project root) of all files installed for this item.

originSourceId.description: For source:"curated" items — references the sourceId from sources.yaml.

useMode.description: How the upstream item was incorporated.

license.description: SPDX license identifier of the upstream source (e.g. MIT).

riskLevel.description: Risk level assessed during curation review.

reviewStatus.description: Curation review gate status. Only approved items are installed.
